title: Ochagavia lindleyana
taxonomy: Ochagavia lindleyana is classified within the plant family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as the pineapple family. This family includes around 57 genera and over 3,000 species of terrestrial, epiphytic, and aquatic plants. As a member of the Bromeliaceae family, Ochagavia lindleyana is further classified within the subfamily Pitcairnioideae. The genus Ochagavia is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. Its classification is consistent with the system used in botanical nomenclature to identify and categorize plant species.

intro: Ochagavia lindleyana, also known as Chilean pine or Roble de Ochagavia, is a species of plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage.
